info.title: BugHerd API
info.description: The BugHerd API v2 allows you to manage projects, tasks, comments, attachments, users, and webhooks for visual bug tracking.

project_id.description: Optional. Omit to receive events for all projects.

BasicAuth.description: Use your API key as the username and 'x' as the password.

status.description: One of: backlog, todo, doing, done, closed, or a custom column name
